network_status.name: Network Status
network_status.recommendation: Please ensure device is connected to a network (WiFi/Ethernet).

location.name: Location & ISP Check
location.recommendation: This might be due to network blocking or API rate limits. Core functionality is not affected.

speed.name: Speed Test
speed.recommendation: Network connection may be unstable. Try switching to a different network environment.

api.name: API Connectivity
api.recommendation: Some APIs are unreachable. Please check your firewall or the service status.

resource.name: Static Resource Loading
resource.recommendation: Failed to load CDN resources. This might be due to a CDN node failure or a local DNS issue.

ui.title: Network Diagnostics
ui.start_msg: Click the button below to start network diagnostics
